     The Numbers Business Report

Plane (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,111,181Details
International Box Office $15,744,169
Worldwide Box Office $47,855,350
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,148,470
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,101,194
Total $3,249,664
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Pilot Brodie Torrance saves his passengers from a lightning strike by making a risky landing on a war-torn island—only to find that surviving the landing was just the beginning. When most of the passengers are taken hostage by dangerous rebels, the only person Torrance can count on for help is Louis Gaspare, an accused murderer who was being transported by the FBI. In order to rescue the passengers, Torrance will need Gaspare’s help, and will learn there’s more to Gaspare than meets the eye.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,265,326 (32.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,023 opening theaters/3,060 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,105,100

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 13th, 2023 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: January 12th, 2023 (Wide), released as Alerta Extrema (Mexico)
January 12th, 2023 (Limited), released as Missão de Resgate (Portugal)
January 19th, 2023 (Limited) (Croatia)
January 19th, 2023 (Wide), released as Mayday (Slovakia)
January 25th, 2023 (Wide), released as The Plane (Italy)
Video Release: February 3rd, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2761 (cert #54012), 12/7/2022)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Franchise: Plane
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Puerto Rico, United States
Plot point: Enemies Forced to Work Together, Plane Crash, Rescue, Extreme Weather
Social setting: In a Plane
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: MadRiver Pictures, di Bonaventura Pictures, Lionsgate, G-Base
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Pilot Brodie Torrance saves his passengers from a lightning strike by making a risky landing on a war-torn island—only to find that surviving the landing was just the beginning. When most of the passengers are taken hostage by dangerous rebels, the only person Torrance can count on for help is Louis Gaspare, an accused murderer who was being transported by the FBI. In order to rescue the passengers, Torrance will need Gaspare’s help, and will learn there’s more to Gaspare than meets the eye.
